name: beats-api
description: Production-ready REST API for a beats marketplace

scripts.migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/prisma.mjs migrate dev
scripts.migrate:staging: cross-env NODE_ENV=staging node scripts/prisma.mjs migrate deploy
scripts.migrate:deploy: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/prisma.mjs migrate deploy
scripts.migrate:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test node scripts/prisma.mjs migrate deploy
scripts.migrate:reset: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/prisma.mjs migrate reset
scripts.db:pull: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/prisma.mjs db pull
scripts.db:pull:staging: cross-env NODE_ENV=staging node scripts/prisma.mjs db pull
scripts.db:pull:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/prisma.mjs db pull
scripts.db:pull:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test node scripts/prisma.mjs db pull
scripts.db:push: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/prisma.mjs db push
